description_long: This is a tall, narrow shelving unit with a rectangular footprint and a modern, minimalist design. The front features five evenly spaced open shelves, each with a flat surface for storing or displaying items. The sides are solid panels, with one side featuring a distinctive curved cutout that partially reveals the shelves and adds a decorative element. The top of the unit is flat with a slightly raised border, suitable for placing small objects or decor. The back and one side are fully enclosed, providing structural support and stability. The overall finish is smooth and uniform, with a light, neutral color that would blend well in urban environments such as sidewalks, lobbies, or public waiting areas.
description: A tall, narrow shelving unit with five open shelves and a curved side cutout, finished in a smooth, light color.
description_view_0: Front view shows a solid panel with a slightly raised border at the top, no shelves visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals five open shelves and a distinctive curved cutout on the side panel.
description_view_2: Back view displays the shelves directly, with the curved side cutout partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows a solid, uninterrupted panel with no shelves or cutouts visible.
